title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 25 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 25 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 25 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 25/04/2023
DCE iron ore futures fall today, the main contract closed 711, an decrease of 1.86% throughout the day;some traders were negative to sell, Some steel mills purchasing enthusiasm is not high. PBF at Shandong port dealt 805-810 yuan/ mt; decreased 0-5 yuan/mt over yesterday. PBF at Tangshan port dealt 817-820 yuan/mt; decreased 5-8 yuan/mt over yesterday.
